faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Melrose, Bronx?
faqs.answer: Melrose residents most commonly encounter pavement ants, odorous house ants, and carpenter ants. Pavement ants often nest in cracks in sidewalks and foundations, while carpenter ants can damage wooden structures in older Melrose buildings. Our technicians identify the specific species to provide targeted treatment.
